title: Income flows from many directions
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for building the expectation of diversified income.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 31 of the MONEY program for when income still feels like it can only come from one place.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 31 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use as a daily check-in when you are building a second or third income stream and want to reinforce the belief that it is possible.

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 31 of the MONEY program. Said in the morning as part of a daily routine, it builds the expectation that more than one income direction is normal and available.
Income flows from many directions. I am open to all of them.
Say it three times in the morning. No visualisation required; the statement is enough on its own said clearly.
Adapted from Day 31 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
